acceptance_criteria.text: B1 Bootstrap path: an init/scaffold drops RepoPact into a new repository
B2 Record templates exist for work item, decision, policy, and evidence run
B3 A LICENSE is present and declared
H1 Audit finding is a real record type with schema, validation, and an example
H2 Symbol-level frozen surface is enforced by check_frozen_surface.py
H3 Schemas-as-enforcement resolved: validator checks against schemas or a decision records them as reference-only
N1 The standard carries an explicit spec version
N2 Work-item depends_on is checked for dependency cycles
